cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow to turn this publication-facing research idea into the next valid artifacts. Do not write code yet.
required_outcomes: select PAPER from the intended claim scope
produce only the artifacts needed for the current stage
record unresolved novelty and feasibility evidence
forbidden_behaviors: run an experiment before protocol and pilot gates

cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow to resume this internal experiment from its existing experiment.json and produce the next evidence-backed decision.
required_outcomes: resume from the latest valid manifest state
preserve existing artifact paths and completed gates
forbidden_behaviors: restart the workflow from idea scoring
silently change the locked evaluation boundary

cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow for a bounded local comparison that will not support novelty or paper claims. Lock the minimum protocol and pilot.
required_outcomes: lock a decision rule and evaluation boundary

cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow to change the primary metric after a completed PAPER experiment and determine which artifacts remain valid.
required_outcomes: identify the metric change as material
route back through the affected gates
forbidden_behaviors: reuse conclusions produced under the old metric
treat the change as a formatting edit

cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow to analyze these completed STANDARD runs. The planned baseline artifact is missing.
required_outcomes: report the missing baseline as an evidence gap
narrow or mark comparative claims unsupported

cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow to audit a historical experiment that has logs and figures but no manifest or protocol.
required_outcomes: record missing controls and workflow history as limitations

cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow to plan a paper story before experiments are complete, including proposed claims, figures, and evidence gaps.
required_outcomes: allow a provisional story and evidence roadmap
label planned evidence and unresolved gaps

cases.prompt: Use $research-experiment-workflow to draft the Experiments section from reviewed analysis.md, figures, and results/summary.json.
required_outcomes: load only the relevant paper-writing guide
map quantitative claims to saved evidence
forbidden_behaviors: repeat the experiment lifecycle from the beginning

cases.prompt: Fix the failing unit test in src/parser.py and run the targeted test suite.
forbidden_behaviors: route ordinary code debugging through research gates

cases.prompt: Diagnose this Python stack trace and explain the root cause.
Give me five possible names for this machine-learning side project.
Summarize this technical report for a product manager.
forbidden_behaviors: require experiment evidence not requested by the user

cases.prompt: Help me design an experiment comparing two retrieval methods.
forbidden_behaviors: create durable artifacts without explicit invocation
